'''√v-b-v''' ('''kavabav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lancinate|lancinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lancinate|lancinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-b-v
|-
! Lemma
| kavabav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thivabav || jivabav || shivabav || kivabav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuvabav || jujuvabav || shushuvabav || kukuvabav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuvabav || juvabav || shuvabav || kuvabav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuvabav || juvabav || shuvabav || kuvabav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thevabav || jevabav || shevabav || kevabav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothovabav || jojovabav || shoshovabav || kokovabav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thovabav || jovabav || shovabav || kovabav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thovabav || jovabav || shovabav || kovabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vabav || vabav || vabav || vabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vabav || vabav || vabav || vabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vabav || vabav || vabav || vabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vabav || vabav || vabav || vabav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thævabav || jævabav || shævabav || kævabav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathavabav || jajavabav || shashavabav || kakavabav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thavabav || javabav || shavabav || kavabav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thavabav || javabav || shavabav || kavabav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shavabav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshavabav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishavabav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shavabavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshavabavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishavabavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shavabavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshavabavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishavabavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shavabavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshavabavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishavabavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shavabavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshavabavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishavabavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shavabavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshavabavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishavabavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shavabavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshavabavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishavabavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shavabavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshavabavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishavabavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shavabavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshavabavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishavabavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shavabavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshavabavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishavabavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shavabavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavabavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavabavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shavabavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshavabavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavabavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shavabavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshavabavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishavabavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shavabavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavabavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavabavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shavabavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshavabavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavabavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shavabavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshavabavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishavabavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shavabavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshavabavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishavabavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shavabavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshavabavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavabavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shavabavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshavabavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishavabavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shavabavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshavabavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishavabavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shavabavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavabavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavabavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
